name: Pollo Borracho (Drunken Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion and garlic in a pan with butter until the onion is soft.
2. Butter a large casserole dish that can hold all ingredients.
3. Place half of the diced ham at the bottom of the dish.
4. Arrange the chicken breasts on top of the ham.
5. Sprinkle the remaining ham, cumin seeds, and dried sage over the chicken.
6. Add the sautéed onion and garlic to the dish.
7. Pour in the white wine and enough chicken stock to cover the chicken.
8. Cover the casserole and bake at 325°F for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
9. Remove the chicken and ham from the casserole and place on a warmed serving platter.
10. Reduce the sauce over high heat in a separate pan.
11. Add flour to thicken the sauce slightly.
12. Pour the sauce over the chicken and ham.
13. Sprinkle with capers and serve.
